---
title: "Work With Me"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

:::: {.work-with-hero-section}

[What I bring in a full-time role]{.work-with-hero-kicker}

I help organizations move from uncertainty to clarity by bringing structure, rigor, and momentum to analytical and research work. I focus on sustained impact through systems-oriented, iterative problem-solving and curiosity grounded in evidence: trustworthy data, sound methods, and communication that supports real decisions.

I work with population, demographic, and administrative data across the full lifecycle - from problem definition and data quality through analysis, communication, and workflow design.

::::

## Credibility and fit

:::: {.wwm-band}
:::: {.wwm-two-col}

:::: {.resume-nested-card}
**Credibility at a glance**

- Seeking full-time analytical, research, or evaluation roles in public-sector and mission-driven settings  
- Trusted by municipal, federal, and academic teams (Active Reliability Status) 
- Experience supporting policy, program, and research environments  
- Work applied to program monitoring, performance measurement, and decision support  
- Experience supervising mixed teams of staff, teaching assistants, and student contributors in research and teaching environments
- Track record coordinating delivery across full-time and part-time contributors with different schedules and skill levels
- Extensive experience working with sensitive data, including health and personally identifiable information, using privacy-conscious and governance-aligned practices
::::

:::: {.resume-nested-card}
**Best-fit environments**

- Roles where analytics, research, or evaluation are central to the role  
- Organizations with clear goals, stable expectations, and feedback grounded in actual outcomes  
- Leadership that values technical reasoning, systems thinking, and curiosity guided by clear priorities and decision points  
- Teams where thoughtful questions, exploration, and learning are encouraged within practical delivery timelines  
- Teams where data access, ethics, and governance expectations are clear enough for responsible work  
::::

::::

::::

## How I contribute

Here's how I show up as a full-time colleague: analytical, systems-oriented, curious, and iterative, with clear ownership, reproducible practice, and collaboration that supports decisions.

:::: {.homepage-focus}

:::: {.homepage-pillars}
:::: {.homepage-pillar}
:::: {.homepage-pillar-index}
01
::::
**End-to-end ownership**  
Own analytical work from question framing through delivery, documentation, and handoff.
::::

:::: {.homepage-pillar}
:::: {.homepage-pillar-index}
02
::::
**Reproducible systems**  
Build and maintain documented workflows, validation routines, and pipelines colleagues can rely on.
::::

:::: {.homepage-pillar}
:::: {.homepage-pillar-index}
03
::::
**Cross-functional partnership**  
Work with policy, program, technical, and research partners using direct, context-aware communication to ask better questions, test options, and translate findings for decision-makers.
::::

:::: {.homepage-pillar}
:::: {.homepage-pillar-index}
04
::::
**Team capability**  
Supervise, coach, and coordinate contributors with different experience levels through clear priorities, practical feedback, and standards that outlast any single project.
::::
::::
::::

## Core capabilities

These are the areas where I contribute most often, along with the outputs and outcomes teams can expect.

::::: {.wwm-band .wwm-services-pricing}
::::: {.wwm-service-grid}

::::: {.resume-nested-card}
**Analytics Systems, Data Quality & Governance**

I build trustworthy analytics systems by combining reproducible workflows, quality controls, and governance-aligned documentation.

**Examples of work:**

- Reproducible data pipelines and validation routines
- Data quality checks, issue tracking, and remediation plans
- Governance-aligned documentation templates and metadata standards
- Privacy-conscious assumptions and workflow documentation

::::: {.wwm-service-card-footer}
**Typical outcomes:**

- More reliable analyses through stronger data controls  
- Faster onboarding and delivery through documented, auditable workflows

:::::
:::::

::::: {.resume-nested-card}
**Research, Evaluation & Analytical Design**

I design research and evaluation approaches that turn complex questions into feasible, defensible analytical plans.

**Examples of work:**

- Research question framing and scope definition  
- Methods selection and analytical design plans  
- Data integration, sampling, and evaluation frameworks  
- Logic models and measurement plans tied to decision needs

::::: {.wwm-service-card-footer}
**Typical outcomes:**

- Stronger alignment between stakeholder goals and analytic approach  
- Decisions supported by methods that are transparent and reproducible

:::::
:::::

::::: {.resume-nested-card}
**Team Leadership, Coaching & Delivery Coordination**

I lead mixed teams by pairing clear role expectations and timelines with coaching that supports confidence, quality, and growth.

**Examples of work:**

- Supervision of staff, teaching assistants, and student contributors
- Task planning and workload coordination across full-time and part-time schedules
- Onboarding, mentoring, and skill development support
- Cross-functional collaboration across academic, technical, and stakeholder groups

:::::: {.wwm-service-card-footer}
**Typical outcomes:**

- More consistent delivery through clearer ownership and coordination  
- Stronger team confidence through practical coaching and knowledge transfer

::::::
::::::

:::::: {.resume-nested-card}
**Spatial & Decision Intelligence**

I translate spatial, demographic, and program data into decision intelligence that technical and non-technical stakeholders can act on.

**Examples of work:**

- Static and interactive maps with demographic overlays  
- Spatial analysis and statistics with place-based interpretation  
- Decision briefs, visualizations, and executive-ready reporting  
- Stakeholder-facing narratives that connect evidence to action

::::: {.wwm-service-card-footer}
**Typical outcomes:**

- Clearer insights in decision forums through interpretable outputs  
- Better planning and policy choices informed by place-based evidence

:::::
:::::

:::::

:::::

## Get in touch

:::: {.homepage-explore}
:::: {.homepage-explore-inner}

I'm open to full-time opportunities, informational conversations, and discussing how my background could fit your team. For a detailed history, see my [full resume](resume.qmd).

**mackaykp@gmail.com**

[Email Kevin](mailto:mackaykp@gmail.com){.btn .btn-primary .homepage-explore-btn}
::::
::::
